title: salvia officinalis f. icterina
intro: Salvia officinalis f. icterina, also known as yellow sage, is a unique variety of the popular medicinal herb Salvia officinalis, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and leaves with a slightly bitter taste. The medicinal properties of yellow sage include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and act as an antiseptic, due to the presence of compounds like thujone and camphor. The health benefits associated with yellow sage include relief from symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to improve memory and concentration. Yellow sage can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
